<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Openai List Files"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/files"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



List files.

Returns a list of files that belong to the user's organization.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"after","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"After"}},{"name":"limit","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"default":10000,"title":"Limit"}},{"name":"order","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string","enum":["asc","desc"],"title":"Order","description":"Sort order for paginated responses."},{"type":"null"}],"default":"desc","title":"Order"}},{"name":"purpose","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string","enum":["assistants","batch"],"title":"OpenAIFilePurpose","description":"Valid purpose values for OpenAI Files API."},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Purpose"}}]}
>

</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

</RequestSchema>
